recommendations.title: Choke
recommendations.overview: A sex-addicted con-man pays for his mother's hospital bills by playing on the sympathies of those who rescue him from choking to death.

recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.

recommendations.title: Arn: The Knight Templar
recommendations.overview: Arn, the son of a high-ranking Swedish nobleman is educated in a monastery and sent to the Holy Land as a knight templar to do penance for a forbidden love.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Squared Love
recommendations.overview: A celebrity journalist and renowned womanizer starts to rethink his life choices after he falls for a mysterious model who leads a double life.

recommendations.title: Chéri
recommendations.overview: The son of a courtesan retreats into a fantasy world after being forced to end his relationship with the older woman who educated him in the ways of love.

recommendations.title: Pegasus
recommendations.overview: Zhang Chi, a hubris and dominating six-time racing champion, falls from grace following a crisis. After a five-year suspension from the motorsport, the now single-father to a six-year-old boy throws down the gauntlet once again.

recommendations.title: Marriage Italian Style
recommendations.overview: During the bombing of Naples in World War II, a cynical businessman helps a naive prostitute, who spends the next two decades desperate to have him reciprocate her feelings.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.
